name: zinput_di_set_joystick_enabled
description: zInput::DI_SetJoystickEnabled acquires/releases the joystick reference and applies gameplay axis ranges and deadzones.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 93 unmasked mismatches after masking 76 relocation bytes; this joystick setup helper has several nested helper calls and axis-configuration stores that need a later source-shape pass.
The native smoke verifies enable/disable behavior, joystick ref-count transitions, gameplay axis ranges/deadzones, and DirectInput property updates through a fake joystick device.
